column2: You have an enormous smile on your face when you're playing with your favorite toy!
You rolled on the grass so fast it felt like you were flying!
Your puppet is smiling at you!
When you give me a big hug with your back, it makes my heart feel happy and full of love!
You can wear your favorite mask to the big parade today!
She felt like she was flying when she fell off her bike!
When you repeat a happy song over and over, it makes everyone in your family smile even more with repeated joy!
I'm running as fast as I can, chasing after my best friend's wagging tail!
When you ask someone "about" something they really love, it makes them super happy!
You made me the yummiest pancake in the whole world!
Little rabbits hop around in the sunny meadow with big smiles on their faces.
I really want to go on a magical adventure with you tomorrow!
I had so much fun playing outside, but now it's OVER and I'm ready for hot chocolate!
A little rabbit wrote a happy verse about all the yummy carrots she found in her garden today!
You held a big, happy orange that made your whole face smile!
The little cockerel proudly showed off his shiny new feathers to Mama Hen.
You're starting something new today, it's the beginning of an amazing adventure!
When we're happy, our ending is super cool!
When you go trick-or-treating with your friends on Halloween night, it's normal to feel a little scared!
The sneaky little rabbit snuck into the garden and made all the flowers smile.
When you resist the tempting cookie, you get to pick a healthier treat instead!
When you hug someone inside your heart, they feel happy too!
The magical eucalyptus tree in our backyard makes me feel happy and calm on sunny afternoons!
You're going to have a happy nap with all your favorite toys!
Your favorite toy is bent but we can fix it together!
You gave your family a big bunch of happy flowers that made everyone smile!
Lily found a big twist in her favorite story that surprised her with a happy ending she never saw coming!
Gulping down a big glass of cold lemonade was so refreshing!
The little fish made a happy gurgle in its tank as it swam around with its new shiny friend!
A big ape named Bongo loves to dance in the jungle!
Doing something special makes me feel so happy and proud of myself!
The yummy hot chocolate was so good it made a big happy slurp sound in her mouth!
You get to join your best friend in a big adventure!
You can write a love letter to your favorite pet!
I just gave my best friend VERY big hugs!
You have been waiting for your birthday party for so long!
Because she loved her puppy so much, she got him a new collar!
Those puppies are playing outside in the sunshine!
You need to follow instructions carefully so you can build an awesome Lego castle!
Your favorite guide will always be there for you on your next adventure!
You can take off those labels that people put on you and become whoever makes you happy!
You made a beautiful sign on your picture that says "I LOVE YOU"!
You can mix a yummy bowl of colorful spaghetti with your favorite sauce!
My favourite colour is pink because it makes me feel happy and colourful!
Your teddy bear goes on amazing adventures with you!
You found your missing best friend under the couch!
Do you get to choose what color ice cream you want after we finish dinner tonight?
When you fold your arms around a hug, it makes everyone feel happy and loved!
You need a big hug from someone you love today!
Learning to ride a bike is actually pretty easy once you get the hang of it!
Look at your favorite poster on the wall!
You can FINISH building your amazing Lego castle with just one more block!
You should give your pet dog a big hug when they wag their tail happily!
People are superheroes who help others every single day!
You can practice your new dance move in front of the mirror every day!
Your favorite puppy loves to flip and twirl in her happy ball!
You got to ride your bike ALL THE WAY TO THE END OF THE STREET, AND IT FELT LIKE YOU WERE OVER THE MOON WITH JOY!
We're going to bake a delicious cake using my favorite recipe that makes everyone smile!
Let's make a yummy pizza together with special ingredients like cheese, sauce, and your favorite toppings!
The baker sprinkled lots of soft flour on her cat's face making it look like a tiny snowman!
Emily's little bunny loved to snuggle up close while she stirred her favorite hot chocolate with a teeny-tiny spoon!
Your super cool toy has lots of awesome features that make it really fun!
If you don't else share your toys with friends, it might feel yucky to play alone!
However, even though we couldn't find that toy, your mom and dad love you very much!
Please give me a big hug because I love you so much!
I knew you could do it if I believed in you!
You have a large smile that can light up an entire room!
You will never run out of hugs from your family and friends because they love you so much!
You get to be the star of your very own SHOW!
Without your smile, my day would be very sad!
Both you and your best friend are superheroes, saving the world with kindness and love!
You can make a beautiful picture with just crayons and your imagination!
Will you ask Mommy or Daddy for a hug?
Your puppy is going to give you a big sloppy happy bite when you play with it outside!
When you smell fresh cookies baking in the oven, does your tummy start to feel happy and warm?
Your mom is making ANOTHER yummy batch of cookies just for you!
Please give me a big hug because I love you very much!
While I blow out the candles on my birthday cake, I wish all my friends had their dreams come true too!
You are still safe in our love forever!
When you give your favorite stuffed animal a big hug and say "I love you", that's called touching someone's heart.
Time is like a special clock that helps us count our adventures!
Your little ear holes are super small because you're so tiny!
I got to wear my favorite super cool pyjamas with unicorns on them!
When my friend told me a silly joke that made me laugh so hard I almost fell over into a big GUFFAW!
When you laugh with your best friends, it makes everyone feel happy inside!
You can plant a tiny flower Daintily in your garden this weekend and watch it grow into something super special!
I found a beautiful rainbow around my house this morning!
The little frog croaked loudly and proudly, showing off its brand new green bow tie!
The children danced merrily in the sunshine on their special birthday party day!
You can show grit by trying again after you fall down!
My brother thought eating Brussels sprouts was HORRID!
I spilled all my favorite ice cream on the floor! It's AWFUL!
You're going to get a super surprise when you open your birthday presents tomorrow!
You know what's TOUGH? Being kind to someone who is feeling sad or lonely!
Your big puzzle finally split open and you got to see all the colorful pieces inside!
You need to check your piggy bank before you go to buy that new toy!
You are going to have an even BETTER day than yesterday because you're surrounded by people who love you!
You can draw a happy face in the corner of your picture book!
The big pyramid in Egypt smiled at us with its ancient secrets.
Would you really want a puppy to play with you every day?
Shake your pom-poms loudly at the big dance party!
Let's pretend we are brave knights on a magical adventure!
Believe in yourself and you can do anything!
The big, fluffy kittens swooped down on us with their soft, cuddly paws.
When you ride a bike with the wind in your hair, you can feel like you're going to glide forever!
The little rabbit drew a happy square with crayons on her paper!
The loud and noisy fireworks made my ears feel happy!
A little rabbit's favorite stalk of celery became her best friend in the garden.
Lily's fluffy plumes were so soft that she loved to snuggle them all day long!
Drawing pictures is a great way to illustrate your own special thoughts and feelings!
The sun was setting over the shore!
Your little girl is still the prettiest in the whole wide world!
